title: GSM BEAVERTON GROUPS AND CLASSES - 211info
text: GOOD SAMARITAN MINISTRIES INTERNATIONAL HEADQUARTERS GSM BEAVERTON GROUPS AND CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith-based group classes on a variety of topics, including anger management, men’s group, mutual support group, and body image and weight management. 7929 SW Cirrus Drive Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by group or class Email (503) 644-2339 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 644-2339 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for the class or group schedule and to register FEES: None; donations accepted DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Anger Management Men's Support Groups Religion/Spirituality Related Support Groups Weight Management Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - COUNSELING MINISTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
